original_abstract: Tewang Kadamba Village is a village located in Katingan Regency, Central Kalimantan Province. In this village, there are various ethnic groups and the dominant language is the Dayak Kaharingan and there are also three religions namely Hinduism, Islam and Christianity where the dominant religion is Islam and Hindu Kaharingan. Seen from a religious perspective, even though there are differences they still maintain, appreciate, respect, and tolerate these differences. There is one problem or problem regarding religious knowledge and enthusiasm for worship in Tewang Kadamba Village. In this regard, the purpose of this study is to find out and describe religious understanding and how people acquire religious knowledge and strengthen religion through regeneration and cadres. The method used is PAR. The results of community service are good understanding of religion and ways to acquire religious knowledge through school education and activities in places of worship. Then related to strengthening religion through regeneration and cadres is a good idea for empowering the people of Tewang Kadamba Village.
humanized_abstract: Tewang Kadamba Village is one of the Villages located in Katingan Regency, Central Kalimantan Province. In the Village there are many tribes, in terms of language it is in the form of Dayak Kaharingan and three religions to which residents of the Village adhere to are Hinduism, Islam and Christianity where Islam and Hindu Kaharingan are dominant religions. Seen from a religious perspective, although there are different religions, in the Village there is still an appreciation of differences between them. In terms of religious knowledge and worship enthusiasm in the Village, the problem faced is how to develop and increase religious understanding of the community in Tewang Kadamba Village. Therefore, the purpose of this research is to know and describe the Religious Understanding and how to get religious knowledge that is done by Regeneration and Cadre through a method of PAR (Participatory Action Research) which resulted in an understanding of religion and also knowledge of religion that can be attained by way of Education in School and also in the places of worship, and it is hoped that through Regeneration and Cadre will also be very effective in strengthening religion for the community of Tewang Kadamba Village.
